title: New Construction Permits Filed For 61 Royal Lane, Crocker Amazon, San Francisco
summary: Demolition and new construction permits have been filed for a residential infill at  61 Royal Lane  in  San Francisco’s   Crocker-Amazon  neighborhood. The approved project is seeking to replace a detached rear structure with a single-family house and an accessory dwelling unit.  Nie Yang Architects  is responsible for the application and design.
claude_rationale: 샌프란시스코 소규모 단독주택 및 ADU 신축 허가 신청으로, Woomi의 전략적 관심 지역이나 규모와 무관한 소형 개발 사례임.
